title: Property Consultant - Gera Developments - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Gera Developments - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Gera Developments, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Gera Developments:
Gera Developments is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gera Developments!
